message.reasoning_content: We are asked to evaluate a source (MemSlides) for applicability to one of Joni's non-core modules. It doesn't directly describe a method, technique, or tool that maps onto any of the listed modules: semantics-measurement, conflict-qualifier, reader-sources, emergence, method-trialing. The source is about memory architecture for personalization in slide generation, not about any of those. There's no concrete connection to measuring semantics, qualifying conflicts, reading sources, emergence, or method-trialing. So it's not applicable. I must output JSON: {"applicable": false}.
